arabic_text: يَـٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَوْفُوا۟ بِعَهْدِىٓ أُوفِ بِعَهْدِكُمْ وَإِيَّـٰىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
verse_text: O Children of Israel! Remember the favours I have bestowed upon you. Keep (your) covenant with Me and I will be true to My covenant with you. Me you must fear (not the others)

arabic_text: وَقَـٰتِلُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَكُمْ وَلَا تَعْتَدُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُعْتَدِينَ
verse_text: And fight for the sake of (establishing and protecting the religion of) Allah those who fight against you, but do not commit aggression (by initiating the fight), for Allah does not love the aggressors.

arabic_text: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ حَقَّ تُقَاتِهِۦ وَلَا تَمُوتُنَّ إِلَّا وَأَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
verse_text: O believers! Be conscious of Allah with all the consciousness that is due to Him, and do not die except as Muslims.

arabic_text: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَا ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةَ فِيهَا هُدًۭى وَنُورٌۭ ۚ يَحْكُمُ بِهَا ٱلنَّبِيُّونَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسْلَمُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ هَادُوا۟ وَٱلرَّبَّـٰنِيُّونَ وَٱلْأَحْبَارُ بِمَا ٱسْتُحْفِظُوا۟ مِن كِتَـٰبِ ٱللَّهِ وَكَانُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ شُهَدَآءَ ۚ فَلَا تَخْشَوُا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ وَٱخْشَوْنِ وَلَا تَشْتَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِى ثَمَنًۭا قَلِيلًۭا ۚ وَمَن لَّمْ يَحْكُم بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
verse_text: Indeed we have revealed the Taurat in which is guidance and light. By it, the Prophets who surrendered themselves (to Allah) judged the Jews, and (so did) the rabbis and the priests who carried out Allah's laws, they were entrusted to guard Allah's Scripture (the Taurat), and they were also the witnesses (so that changes should not be made). So have no fear of men but fear Me, (by not committing sins and by obeying my orders); and do not sell my signs for a trifling gain (by ignoring them just to obtain wealth through corruption and social position, and worldly convenience). For those who do not judge in accordance with what Allah has revealed, they are disbelievers.

arabic_text: يَخَافُونَ رَبَّهُم مِّن فَوْقِهِمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ ۩
verse_text: they all fear their lord, who is High above them (in might) and they do whatever they are bidden to do.

arabic_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌۭ وَأَجْرٌۭ كَبِيرٌۭ
verse_text: indeed , those who fear (to transgress the bounds of the law of) their lord, although they cannot be seen , and they cannot see his scourge, they shall be forgiven and richlt rewarded.

arabic_text: وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُم بِشَىْءٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْخَوْفِ وَٱلْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْوَٰلِ وَٱلْأَنفُسِ وَٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
verse_text: And certainly! We shall test you with some fear (of the enemy), and hunger, and with the loss of properties, lives and crops. And give good news to the patient.

arabic_text: أَمْ حَسِبْتُمْ أَن تَدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَلَمَّا يَأْتِكُم مَّثَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوْا۟ مِن قَبْلِكُم ۖ مَّسَّتْهُمُ ٱلْبَأْسَآءُ وَٱلضَّرَّآءُ وَزُلْزِلُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يَقُولَ ٱلرَّسُولُ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ مَتَىٰ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ نَصْرَ ٱللَّهِ قَرِيبٌۭ
verse_text: Or do you think that you would enter Paradise without having suffered like those (believers) who passed away before you? Affliction (with the destruction of properties) and adversity like diseases befell them and they were so shaken (by danger from the enemy) that the Messenger and the believers with him cried out: 'When will the help of Allah come?' Know that Allah's help is ever near (as long as you persevere and persistently adhere to Allah's religion).

arabic_text: قَدْ خَلَتْ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ سُنَنٌۭ فَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verse_text: Indeed, there have passed away before you (examples of events based on) the ways of life determined by Allah. Therefore, travel through the land and then see what was the fate of those who disbelieved (their Messengers).

arabic_text: وَلْيَخْشَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَوْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّةًۭ ضِعَـٰفًا خَافُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ فَلْيَتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلْيَقُولُوا۟ قَوْلًۭا سَدِيدًا
verse_text: Let them stand in awe (of Allah and do not maltreat the orphans) those (guardians of the orphans) - who if they themselves had to leave behind helpless offspring, would feel fear on their account (about their safety and their future). Therefore, let them remain conscious of Allah and speak appropriate words (of truth).

arabic_text: فَتَرَى ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌۭ يُسَـٰرِعُونَ فِيهِمْ يَقُولُونَ نَخْشَىٰٓ أَن تُصِيبَنَا دَآئِرَ ةٌۭ ۚ فَعَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَأْتِىَ بِٱلْفَتْحِ أَوْ أَمْرٍۢ مِّنْ عِندِهِۦ فَيُصْبِحُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَسَرُّوا۟ فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ نَـٰدِمِينَ
verse_text: And you see (the hypocrites) in whose hearts is a disease, hastening towards (the Jews and the Christians) for their goodwill, saying: 'We fear that a misfortune will fall on us (thus forcing us to seek their help).' But it may happen that Allah will grant victory (to His Messenger and the believers), or He may cause a decision to come about (against the hypocrites). In that case they shall regret the thoughts that they had hidden in their hearts.

arabic_text: ٱلَّذِينَ يُبَلِّغُونَ رِسَـٰلَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَخْشَوْنَهُۥ وَلَا يَخْشَوْنَ أَحَدًا إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ ۗ وَكَفَىٰ بِٱللَّهِ حَسِيبًۭا
verse_text: (The previous Prophets) are those who convey the Messages of Allah and fear Him, and they fear none but Allah. And Sufficient is Allah as Reckoner (in reckoning everything done by His creation and recompensing all concerned).

arabic_text: مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ
verse_text: From the mischief of the slinking prompter,

arabic_text: وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
verse_text: And from the mischief of the envier when he envies.

arabic_text: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًۭى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verse_text: This Book is without doubt (as regard to its divine origin and perfection), a guide for those who are God-conscious (taqwa);

arabic_text: إِنَّمَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ وَإِذَا تُلِيَتْ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُهُۥ زَادَتْهُمْ إِيمَـٰنًۭا وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
verse_text: The true believers (with complete faith) are those whose hearts are filled with awe at the mention of Allah (and His attributes); and whose faith grows stronger as they listen to His revelations and they put all their trust in their Lord.

arabic_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
verse_text: Indeed, those who live in fear of their Lord's (wrath);

arabic_text: أَمَّنْ هُوَ قَـٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيْلِ سَاجِدًۭا وَقَآئِمًۭا يَحْذَرُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ وَيَرْجُوا۟ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّهِۦ ۗ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِى ٱلَّذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ ۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ
verse_text: '(Are you the better person) or he who passes his night in adoration, prostrating himself or standing up, while dreading the (terrors of) the Hereafter, and hoping to earn the mercy of his Lord?' Say (to him): 'Are those who know equal to those who know not?' Truly none will take heed but men of understanding.

arabic_text: قُلِ ٱللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ عَـٰلِمَ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ أَنتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ فِى مَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
verse_text: But as for those who fear for themselves when they will be in the presence of the majesty of their Lord (when their deeds are taken into account), there are two Gardens (i.e. in Paradise),-

arabic_text: مَن يَأْتِيهِ عَذَابٌۭ يُخْزِيهِ وَيَحِلُّ عَلَيْهِ عَذَابٌۭ مُّقِيمٌ
verse_text: But as for those who feared to stand before their Lord (to be judged), and curbed the lower desires of their soul,

arabic_text: ٱلَّذِينَ قَالَ لَهُمُ ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ قَدْ جَمَعُوا۟ لَكُمْ فَٱخْشَوْهُمْ فَزَادَهُمْ إِيمَـٰنًۭا وَقَالُوا۟ حَسْبُنَا ٱللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ ٱلْوَكِيلُ
verse_text: They are those who, on being told (by a news bearer): '(The unbelieving polytheists) have mustered a great force against you, so fear them', thereby grew more tenacious in their faith and replied: 'Allah is All-Sufficient for us (as help). And He is the best Guardian (and all our affairs are referred back to Him).'

arabic_text: وَٱذْكُرُوٓا۟ إِذْ أَنتُمْ قَلِيلٌۭ مُّسْتَضْعَفُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ تَخَافُونَ أَن يَتَخَطَّفَكُمُ ٱلنَّاسُ فَـَٔاوَىٰكُمْ وَأَيَّدَكُم بِنَصْرِهِۦ وَرَزَقَكُم مِّنَ ٱلطَّيِّبَـٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
verse_text: And remember how He gave you shelter when you were small in number and considered weak in the land, ever fearing that men might despoil and kidnap you, He made you strong with His help and bestowed great benefits upon you, so that you might be grateful.

arabic_text: أَلَا تُقَـٰتِلُونَ قَوْمًۭا نَّكَثُوٓا۟ أَيْمَـٰنَهُمْ وَهَمُّوا۟ بِإِخْرَاجِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَهُم بَدَءُوكُمْ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ ۚ أَتَخْشَوْنَهُمْ ۚ فَٱللَّهُ أَحَقُّ أَن تَخْشَوْهُ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verse_text: Will you not fight against those who have broken their oaths and conspired to banish the Messenger? They were the first to attack you. Do you fear them (so much so that you refuse to fight them)? Surely Allah is more deserving of your fear (so that you do not disobey Him) if you are true believers.

arabic_text: وَبَشِّرِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ أَنَّ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۖ كُلَّمَا رُزِقُوا۟ مِنْهَا مِن ثَمَرَةٍۢ رِّزْقًۭا ۙ قَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى رُزِقْنَا مِن قَبْلُ ۖ وَأُتُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُتَشَـٰبِهًۭا ۖ وَلَهُمْ فِيهَآ أَزْوَٰجٌۭ مُّطَهَّرَةٌۭ ۖ وَهُمْ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ
verse_text: And give good tidings to those who believe and do good works that for them will be Gardens underneath which rivers flow. Whenever they are given fruits to eat, they say: 'This is what we were given before', for they shall be given things in resemblance in form (but different in nature). And in there they have pure and holy spouses/wives, and they shall abide there forever.

arabic_text: فَرِحِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَيَسْتَبْشِرُونَ بِٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يَلْحَقُوا۟ بِهِم مِّنْ خَلْفِهِمْ أَلَّا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
verse_text: (And also) extremely jubilant are they with His Bounty (as a reward for their martyrdom) and rejoicing with the good news that those whom they left behind (the Muslims who are still fighting) and who have not yet joined them (still alive and continuing the struggle) that they shall have nothing to fear (from anything undesirable happening) nor shall they grieve.

arabic_text: ۞ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ بِنِعْمَةٍۢ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَفَضْلٍۢ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verse_text: They rejoice in the glad tidings of Allah's grace and bounty. And (remember) that Allah will not deny the reward of the faithful.

arabic_text: يُبَشِّرُهُمْ رَبُّهُم بِرَحْمَةٍۢ مِّنْهُ وَرِضْوَٰنٍۢ وَجَنَّـٰتٍۢ لَّهُمْ فِيهَا نَعِيمٌۭ مُّقِيمٌ
verse_text: Their Lord gives them glad tidings of mercy from Himself, and of His Good pleasure, and of Gardens for them wherein are delights of eternal bliss.

arabic_text: لَهُمُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَفِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ ۚ لَا تَبْدِيلَ لِكَلِمَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verse_text: For them there is the glad tidings in this world and in the Hereafter: No change can there be in the words of Allah consisting of His promises. That is indeed the supreme triumph.

arabic_text: ۞ وَقِيلَ لِلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ مَاذَآ أَنزَلَ رَبُّكُمْ ۚ قَالُوا۟ خَيْرًۭا ۗ لِّلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هَـٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌۭ ۚ وَلَدَارُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ خَيْرٌۭ ۚ وَلَنِعْمَ دَارُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
verse_text: But when those who are conscious of God are asked: 'What was revealed by your Lord?' They answered: 'All that is good.' Good is the reward of those who do good works in this life: but far better is the reward of the Hereafter. Excellent indeed will be the home of those who were God-conscious.

arabic_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتُ ٱلْفِرْدَوْسِ نُزُلًا
verse_text: As for those who have faith and do good works, they shall dwell in the Gardens of Paradise for their enjoyment (which is full of ultimate wealth, pleasure and bliss).

arabic_text: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍۢ جَعَلْنَا مَنسَكًۭا لِّيَذْكُرُوا۟ ٱسْمَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَىٰ مَا رَزَقَهُم مِّنۢ بَهِيمَةِ ٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ ۗ فَإِلَـٰهُكُمْ إِلَـٰهٌۭ وَٰحِدٌۭ فَلَهُۥٓ أَسْلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ ٱلْمُخْبِتِينَ
verse_text: And for every nation, We have ordained the rites of sacrifice (and other rites), that they may pronounce the name of Allah in gratitude for His gifts to them, namely the sacrificial animals. For your Lord, is the One and Only God; to Him surrender yourselves. And give good news (O Muhammad) to those who obey in humbleness

arabic_text: فِى بِضْعِ سِنِينَ ۗ لِلَّهِ ٱلْأَمْرُ مِن قَبْلُ وَمِنۢ بَعْدُ ۚ وَيَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَفْرَحُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verse_text: In less than ten years. The decision of the matter, before and after is only with Allah. And on that day (when the Romans gained victory), the believers will rejoice

arabic_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱجْتَنَبُوا۟ ٱلطَّـٰغُوتَ أَن يَعْبُدُوهَا وَأَنَابُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ لَهُمُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ ۚ فَبَشِّرْ عِبَادِ
verse_text: And those who shun the powers of evil (Taghut) lest they be tempted to worship them or pay devotions to them, and instead turn to Allah in repentance for them there is good news (the moment they yield up their souls in death). Therefore, give the good news to my servants (O Muhammad)

arabic_text: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى صَدَقَنَا وَعْدَهُۥ وَأَوْرَثَنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ نَتَبَوَّأُ مِنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ حَيْثُ نَشَآءُ ۖ فَنِعْمَ أَجْرُ ٱلْعَـٰمِلِينَ
verse_text: They will say: 'Praise be to Allah Who has made good to us His promise, and given us this land of Paradise to inherit, that we may dwell here wherever we please. How excellent a reward for those who work.'

arabic_text: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍۢ وَنَعِيمٍۢ
verse_text: As for the God-conscious they will be in fair gardens of Paradise, and bliss (indescribable).

arabic_text: تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِهِمْ نَضْرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verse_text: You shall see in their faces the glow of joy

arabic_text: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًۭا ۖ رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
verse_text: Their reward is with God: Gardens of Eden (a permanent dwelling place), underneath which rivers flow, where they shall dwell forever. Allah is well-pleased with them, and they with Him (thanking Him). This is (in store) for him who fears (to go against the commands of) his Lord.

arabic_text: وَلَا تَهِنُوا۟ وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا۟ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَوْنَ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verse_text: And do not despair (in your struggle in the defence and promulgation of Islam), nor grieve (for what will happen to you), for you shall surely gain the upper hand (against your enemy) if you are (true) believers.

arabic_text: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱشْتَرَىٰ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَأَمْوَٰلَهُم بِأَنَّ لَهُمُ ٱلْجَنَّةَ ۚ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَيَقْتُلُونَ وَيُقْتَلُونَ ۖ وَعْدًا عَلَيْهِ حَقًّۭا فِى ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةِ وَٱلْإِنجِيلِ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ۚ وَمَنْ أَوْفَىٰ بِعَهْدِهِۦ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ فَٱسْتَبْشِرُوا۟ بِبَيْعِكُمُ ٱلَّذِى بَايَعْتُم بِهِۦ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verse_text: Allah has indeed purchased of the believers their lives and their wealth (in return) for Paradise (for they fight for the cause of Allah, and they slay and be slain). (Paradise as a reward) is the true pledge, which Allah has made in the Taurat, the Injil and the Qur'an. And who is more true to his promise than Allah? Rejoice then in the bargain you have made, and (know that) it is the supreme triumph.

arabic_text: قَالُوٓا۟ أَءِنَّكَ لَأَنتَ يُوسُفُ ۖ قَالَ أَنَا۠ يُوسُفُ وَهَـٰذَآ أَخِى ۖ قَدْ مَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَتَّقِ وَيَصْبِرْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verse_text: They asked (in confusion and amazement): 'Is it indeed that you are Yusuf?' He replied: 'Yes I am Yusuf and this is my brother (Bunyamin). Allah has been gracious to us. Those who are conscious of Him and endure with fortitude in adversity, Allah will not deny the doers of good their reward.'

arabic_text: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ وَأَصْلَحْنَا لَهُۥ زَوْجَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يُسَـٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ وَيَدْعُونَنَا رَغَبًۭا وَرَهَبًۭا ۖ وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا خَـٰشِعِينَ
verse_text: Then We heard his prayer, and bestowed on him (his son) Yahya, and We cured his wife of barrenness (to give birth to a child) for him. (We granted many favours to the Messengers because) they used to vie with each other in good works and called on Us with hope and awe and they were humble (and devoted) to Us.

arabic_text: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُؤْتَوْنَ أَجْرَهُم مَّرَّتَيْنِ بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ وَيَدْرَءُونَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ ٱلسَّيِّئَةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَـٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
verse_text: These are the people who shall be given their reward twice, because they were patient. Furthermore, they reject evil with good, and give in alms a part of that which We bestowed on them as sustenance.

arabic_text: قُلْ يَـٰعِبَادِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ۚ لِلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هَـٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌۭ ۗ وَأَرْضُ ٱللَّهِ وَٰسِعَةٌ ۗ إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى ٱلصَّـٰبِرُونَ أَجْرَهُم بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍۢ
verse_text: Say (My words, O Muhammad, to men of understanding): 'O you My servants who believe! Be conscious of your Lord. (Bear in mind that) those who do good works in this life shall receive a good reward (in the life to come). And (remember) Allah's earth is vast (for you to migrate if you are persecuted). Truly, those who endure with fortitude in adversity shall be rewarded without measure.'

arabic_text: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verse_text: Therefore, (be steadfast and firm in your belief). Truly, with every hardship there is ease,

arabic_text: وَلَئِنْ أَذَقْنَـٰهُ نَعْمَآءَ بَعْدَ ضَرَّآءَ مَسَّتْهُ لَيَقُولَنَّ ذَهَبَ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتُ عَنِّىٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَفَرِحٌۭ فَخُورٌ
verse_text: And surely, if after adversity We bestow favours upon him, he will say: 'Gone are my sorrows from me', and grows jubilant (with good fortune) and becomes boastful (to people).

arabic_text: وَٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ قَآئِمَةٌۭ فَضَحِكَتْ فَبَشَّرْنَـٰهَا بِإِسْحَـٰقَ وَمِن وَرَآءِ إِسْحَـٰقَ يَعْقُوبَ
verse_text: And his wife, who was standing by, rejoiced (for she lost her fear). We gave her the good news (through the angels) (of the birth of) Ishaq, and after Ishaq, (a grandson) Ya'qub.

arabic_text: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَسُلْطَـٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verse_text: When the bearer of good news arrived, he placed Yusuf's shirt on Ya'qub's face, and his sight came back to him. Ya'qub said: 'Did I not tell you that I know from Allah (through revelation) what you do not know?'

arabic_text: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًۭا
verse_text: And shall go back rejoicing to his (believing) family!

arabic_text: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍۢ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
verse_text: And We shall remove whatever rancour may be in their breasts: they shall thus be brothers (in an atmosphere of love and harmony), and shall recline on raised couches joyfully facing each other.

arabic_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّـٰتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍۢ وَٱجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
verse_text: And also the (true servants of Allah are those) who say in their prayer: 'O Lord, grant that our wives and children be a joy to our eyes, and make us examples for those who are conscious of You.'

arabic_text: إِنَّ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى شُغُلٍۢ فَـٰكِهُونَ
verse_text: On that day the people of Paradise will have joy in all that they do;

arabic_text: هُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُهُمْ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
verse_text: Together with their partners, they shall enjoy themselves in groves of pleasant shade, reclining on thrones (of dignity).

arabic_text: ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ أَنتُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُكُمْ تُحْبَرُونَ
verse_text: (They will be given excellent rewards and it will be said to them): 'Enter you the Garden, you and your wives (who are faithful) endowed with extreme pleasure and bliss.'

arabic_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَـٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَـٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍۢ ۚ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌۭ
verse_text: And those who believe and are followed in faith by their descendants, We cause their descendants to join them (in Paradise), and We (with that) deprive them of nothing of their work; every person will be held in pledge for whatever he has earned.

arabic_text: أَفَمَن زُيِّنَ لَهُۥ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ فَرَءَاهُ حَسَنًۭا ۖ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُضِلُّ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۖ فَلَا تَذْهَبْ نَفْسُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ حَسَرَٰتٍ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا يَصْنَعُونَ
verse_text: (You just think), is he whose evil deed is made fair-seeming (by Satan) to him, so that he considers it as good (like the man who is rightly guided)? Allah leaves in error whom He wills, and guides whom He pleases. So do not waste yourself away in sorrowing over them. Truly, Allah has full knowledge of what they do.

arabic_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱلَّذِينَ هَادُوا۟ وَٱلنَّصَـٰرَىٰ وَٱلصَّـٰبِـِٔينَ مَنْ ءَامَنَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًۭا فَلَهُمْ أَجْرُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ وَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
verse_text: Truly the believers, Jews, Christians and Sabi'in ' whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, and does what is right shall be rewarded by their Lord, and there shall be no fear upon them (from any harm) neither shall they grieve.

arabic_text: وَلَا تَهِنُوا۟ وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا۟ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَوْنَ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verse_text: And do not despair (in your struggle in the defence and promulgation of Islam), nor grieve (for what will happen to you), for you shall surely gain the upper hand (against your enemy) if you are (true) believers.

arabic_text: وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُسَـٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْكُفْرِ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ لَن يَضُرُّوا۟ ٱللَّهَ شَيْـًۭٔا ۗ يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ أَلَّا يَجْعَلَ لَهُمْ حَظًّۭا فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
verse_text: And do not be grieved (O Muhammad) by those who rush headlong into disbelief, for they will not harm Allah in the least. It is Allah's will to assign them no portion in the Hereafter (that is the good reward of Paradise). And their punishment shall be terrible indeed.

arabic_text: قَدْ نَعْلَمُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيَحْزُنُكَ ٱلَّذِى يَقُولُونَ ۖ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَا يُكَذِّبُونَكَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ يَجْحَدُونَ
verse_text: Well do We know that what such people say grieves you indeed (O Muhammad), (so do not be grieved) for it is not you to whom they give the lie, but these evildoers deny the revelations of Allah (due to their sheer obstinacy).

arabic_text: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَشْكُوا۟ بَثِّى وَحُزْنِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَأَعْلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verse_text: He (Prophet Ya'qub) replied: 'I complain to Allah alone of my sorrow and anguish. And I know from Allah (through revelation) what you do not know.'

arabic_text: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ ٱلْقُلُوبُ
verse_text: (These are) those who believe and whose hearts find restfulness in the remembrance of Allah. Surely, in the remembrance of Allah all hearts find restfulness.

arabic_text: وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّ ٱلْعِزَّةَ لِلَّهِ جَمِيعًا ۚ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verse_text: And let their words not grieve you (O Muhammad). Truly, all glory belongs to Allah. He alone is All-Hearing and All-Knowing.

arabic_text: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًۭا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verse_text: Do not turn your eyes with longing to the good things We have bestowed on certain classes of (the unbelievers), nor grieve on their account (because of their lack of faith and of your failure to make Islam as strong as you hoped); instead spread the wings of your tenderness over the believers (all the more so when they are poor).

arabic_text: فَلَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌۭ نَّفْسَكَ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِمْ إِن لَّمْ يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَسَفًا
verse_text: Therefore, you should not (O Muhammad) destroy yourself with grief sorrowing after the effects of their evil deeds if they do not believe in the Qur'an.

arabic_text: لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۚ لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتْ وَعَلَيْهَا مَا ٱكْتَسَبَتْ ۗ رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَآ إِن نَّسِينَآ أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَآ إِصْرًۭا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِۦ ۖ وَٱعْفُ عَنَّا وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَٱرْحَمْنَآ ۚ أَنتَ مَوْلَىٰنَا فَٱنصُرْنَا عَلَى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verse_text: Allah does not burden any soul with more than it can bear. In his favour shall be whatever good he does, and against him whatever evil he does. (Believers! Pray thus to your Lord): 'O Lord! Do not take us to task if we forget or lapse into error. O Lord! Do not lay on us the burden as you laid on those before us. O Lord! Make us not bear burdens, which we have no strength to bear. And overlook our faults, and forgive us, and have mercy on us. You are our Supreme Guardian. Grant us victory over the unbelievers!

arabic_text: وَتَوَلَّىٰ عَنْهُمْ وَقَالَ يَـٰٓأَسَفَىٰ عَلَىٰ يُوسُفَ وَٱبْيَضَّتْ عَيْنَاهُ مِنَ ٱلْحُزْنِ فَهُوَ كَظِيمٌۭ
verse_text: Then he (their father, Prophet Ya'qub) turned his face from them (upon hearing the sad news) and said: 'Alas for Yusuf!', and his eyes went white with weeping due to grief, for he was a person who controls anger in his heart.

arabic_text: لِيُنفِقْ ذُو سَعَةٍۢ مِّن سَعَتِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن قُدِرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقُهُۥ فَلْيُنفِقْ مِمَّآ ءَاتَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ ۚ لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا مَآ ءَاتَىٰهَا ۚ سَيَجْعَلُ ٱللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍۢ يُسْرًۭا
verse_text: Let the rich man spend according to his means and the man whose resources are restricted spend according to what Allah has given him (whatever that he can afford). Allah does not put the burden on any person beyond what He has given him. (Those who are in straitened circumstances must remember that) after a difficulty Allah will soon bring relief.

arabic_text: إِلَّا تَنصُرُوهُ فَقَدْ نَصَرَهُ ٱللَّهُ إِذْ أَخْرَجَهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ثَانِىَ ٱثْنَيْنِ إِذْ هُمَا فِى ٱلْغَارِ إِذْ يَقُولُ لِصَـٰحِبِهِۦ لَا تَحْزَنْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَنَا ۖ فَأَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ سَكِينَتَهُۥ عَلَيْهِ وَأَيَّدَهُۥ بِجُنُودٍۢ لَّمْ تَرَوْهَا وَجَعَلَ كَلِمَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ٱلسُّفْلَىٰ ۗ وَكَلِمَةُ ٱللَّهِ هِىَ ٱلْعُلْيَا ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ
verse_text: If you do not help him (Prophet Muhammad), then indeed Allah will help him as He helped him when the disbelievers (of Makkah) drove him out (from Makkah) (and he was but) the second of the two; when they two were (sheltering) in the cave, he said to his companion: 'Grieve not. Truly Allah is with us.' Allah caused His tranquillity to descend upon him (Muhammad) and sent to his aid invisible forces (of angels). And Allah brought utterly low the cause of the unbelievers and exalted the word of Allah (Islam) making it supreme (forever), for Allah is Almighty, All-Wise.

arabic_text: كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْقِتَالُ وَهُوَ كُرْهٌۭ لَّكُمْ ۖ وَعَسَىٰٓ أَن تَكْرَهُوا۟ شَيْـًۭٔا وَهُوَ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكُمْ ۖ وَعَسَىٰٓ أَن تُحِبُّوا۟ شَيْـًۭٔا وَهُوَ شَرٌّۭ لَّكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verse_text: Fighting is made obligatory for you (to fight against aggression) even though you dislike it. But you may hate a thing which is good for you, and love a thing which is bad for you. And (remember) that Allah alone knows (all these things) but you do not know.

arabic_text: قَالَ فَإِنَّهَا مُحَرَّمَةٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ۛ أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةًۭ ۛ يَتِيهُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ فَلَا تَأْسَ عَلَى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verse_text: Allah declared: 'This land shall be forbidden for them to enter for forty years, during which time they shall wander homeless (for that period of time) on the earth (the Sinai desert). Do not grieve for these wicked people.'

arabic_text: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰٓأَبَانَآ إِنَّا ذَهَبْنَا نَسْتَبِقُ وَتَرَكْنَا يُوسُفَ عِندَ مَتَـٰعِنَا فَأَكَلَهُ ٱلذِّئْبُ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ بِمُؤْمِنٍۢ لَّنَا وَلَوْ كُنَّا صَـٰدِقِينَ
verse_text: They said: 'O father! We went racing with one another and left Yusuf with our things. Then the wolf devoured him. But you will never believe us, though we speak the truth.'

arabic_text: وَلَا عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا مَآ أَتَوْكَ لِتَحْمِلَهُمْ قُلْتَ لَآ أَجِدُ مَآ أَحْمِلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ تَوَلَّوا۟ وَّأَعْيُنُهُمْ تَفِيضُ مِنَ ٱلدَّمْعِ حَزَنًا أَلَّا يَجِدُوا۟ مَا يُنفِقُونَ
verse_text: And nor shall those be blamed who, when they came to you (asking for) mounts to the battle-front and you said: 'I can find none to carry you,' and they went away in tears grieving that they could not find the means to spend (to fight in the cause of Allah).

arabic_text: قَدْ نَعْلَمُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيَحْزُنُكَ ٱلَّذِى يَقُولُونَ ۖ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَا يُكَذِّبُونَكَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ يَجْحَدُونَ
verse_text: Well do We know that what such people say grieves you indeed (O Muhammad), (so do not be grieved) for it is not you to whom they give the lie, but these evildoers deny the revelations of Allah (due to their sheer obstinacy).

arabic_text: وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّ ٱلْعِزَّةَ لِلَّهِ جَمِيعًا ۚ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verse_text: And let their words not grieve you (O Muhammad). Truly, all glory belongs to Allah. He alone is All-Hearing and All-Knowing.

arabic_text: بِئْسَمَا ٱشْتَرَوْا۟ بِهِۦٓ أَنفُسَهُمْ أَن يَكْفُرُوا۟ بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بَغْيًا أَن يُنَزِّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦ ۖ فَبَآءُو بِغَضَبٍ عَلَىٰ غَضَبٍۢ ۚ وَلِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌۭ مُّهِينٌۭ
verse_text: Evil in the extreme (what they committed) is the price for which they have sold their souls; in that they deny the Qur'an which Allah has sent down, out of envy that Allah should bestow anything of His favour (i.e. revelation) on whom He chooses from His servants (i.e. Prophet Muhammad (pbuh)). Due to this reason, they have incurred Allah's most inexorable wrath, anger upon anger. For the unbelievers is a humiliating punishment.

arabic_text: ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقُونَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقَـٰتُ بَعْضُهُم مِّنۢ بَعْضٍۢ ۚ يَأْمُرُونَ بِٱلْمُنكَرِ وَيَنْهَوْنَ عَنِ ٱلْمَعْرُوفِ وَيَقْبِضُونَ أَيْدِيَهُمْ ۚ نَسُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَنَسِيَهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ هُمُ ٱلْفَـٰسِقُونَ
verse_text: Be they men and women, the hypocrites are all alike. They enjoin what is evil, forbid what is right, and tighten their purse strings (niggardly). They have forgotten Allah (by disregarding His ordinances), so Allah has forgotten them (by disregarding them). Indeed the hypocrites are evildoers.

arabic_text: ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَهْزِئُ بِهِمْ وَيَمُدُّهُمْ فِى طُغْيَـٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
verse_text: Allah will mock them, leaving them to wonder blindly on (to and fro) in their contumacy

arabic_text: ۞ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ تَوَلَّوْا۟ قَوْمًا غَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مَّا هُم مِّنكُمْ وَلَا مِنْهُمْ وَيَحْلِفُونَ عَلَى ٱلْكَذِبِ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
verse_text: Have you not observed (how evil it is for) those who have befriended a people who have incurred Allah's wrath (because of their disbelief and perfidy)? They belong neither to you nor to them (because they are the hypocrites). They swear a false oath knowingly.

arabic_text: وَإِذَا نَادَيْتُمْ إِلَى ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ٱتَّخَذُوهَا هُزُوًۭا وَلَعِبًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌۭ لَّا يَعْقِلُونَ
verse_text: And when you call (the azan) to prayer, they treat it as a jest and a pastime. They do this because they are devoid of understanding.

arabic_text: وَلَمَّا رَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبَـٰنَ أَسِفًۭا قَالَ بِئْسَمَا خَلَفْتُمُونِى مِنۢ بَعْدِىٓ ۖ أَعَجِلْتُمْ أَمْرَ رَبِّكُمْ ۖ وَأَلْقَى ٱلْأَلْوَاحَ وَأَخَذَ بِرَأْسِ أَخِيهِ يَجُرُّهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِ ۚ قَالَ ٱبْنَ أُمَّ إِنَّ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱسْتَضْعَفُونِى وَكَادُوا۟ يَقْتُلُونَنِى فَلَا تُشْمِتْ بِىَ ٱلْأَعْدَآءَ وَلَا تَجْعَلْنِى مَعَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verse_text: And when Prophet Musa returned to his people, angry and grieved, he said: 'Most evil indeed is the thing you have done in my absence! Would you hasten on the judgment of your Lord (and you did not wait for His orders)? And he put down the Tablets (of the Taurat) and seized his brother (Prophet Harun) by (the hair), dragging him towards him. Prophet Harun cried: 'O son of my mother! Indeed the people considered me weak and almost killed me (when I tried to stop them); so do not let the enemies take pleasure on account of (you reprimanding) me. And do not number me among the wrongdoers.'

arabic_text: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبَـٰنَ أَسِفًۭا ۚ قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا ۚ أَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِى
verse_text: Angry and sorrowful, Prophet Musa returned to his people. He said: 'My people! Did your Lord not make you a gracious promise? Did the time appointed of my absence seem too long to you, or was it to incur your Lord's anger that you broke your promise to me?'

arabic_text: ۞ إِذْ تُصْعِدُونَ وَلَا تَلْوُۥنَ عَلَىٰٓ أَحَدٍۢ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدْعُوكُمْ فِىٓ أُخْرَىٰكُمْ فَأَثَـٰبَكُمْ غَمًّۢا بِغَمٍّۢ لِّكَيْلَا تَحْزَنُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلَا مَآ أَصَـٰبَكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verse_text: (Remember) how you fled and paid no heed to anyone whilst the Messenger (who was still fighting valiantly) in your rear was calling out to you (to continue fighting but you disobeyed him). Therefore, Allah rewarded you with grief (that is defeat) because of your act (of disobedience against the Messenger's order) which caused (his) grief, so that He might (teach you) not (to) grieve for what you missed or (grieve over) that which befell you. And (remember that) Allah knows well all that you do.

arabic_text: وَإِذْ قَتَلْتُمْ نَفْسًۭا فَٱدَّٰرَْٰٔتُمْ فِيهَا ۖ وَٱللَّهُ مُخْرِجٌۭ مَّا كُنتُمْ تَكْتُمُونَ
verse_text: And (remember) when you slew a man and got into a dispute among yourselves as regard to the crime, Allah will bring to light what you would conceal.

arabic_text: وَإِذْ نَجَّيْنَـٰكُم مِّنْ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَسُومُونَكُمْ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ وَيَسْتَحْيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمْ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكُم بَلَآءٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَظِيمٌۭ
verse_text: And (remember) when We delivered you from Fir'aun and his people who had oppressed you cruelly, slaying your sons and sparing your daughters. Surely that was a tremendous trial from your Lord.

arabic_text: إِذْ جَآءُوكُم مِّن فَوْقِكُمْ وَمِنْ أَسْفَلَ مِنكُمْ وَإِذْ زَاغَتِ ٱلْأَبْصَـٰرُ وَبَلَغَتِ ٱلْقُلُوبُ ٱلْحَنَاجِرَ وَتَظُنُّونَ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلظُّنُونَا۠
verse_text: They came upon you from above and from below you, and the eyes were blurred (due to fear and confusion) and hearts leapt to your throats (due to fear), and you were imagining vain thoughts about Allah.

arabic_text: فَبِمَا نَقْضِهِم مِّيثَـٰقَهُمْ وَكُفْرِهِم بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَقَتْلِهِمُ ٱلْأَنۢبِيَآءَ بِغَيْرِ حَقٍّۢ وَقَوْلِهِمْ قُلُوبُنَا غُلْفٌۢ ۚ بَلْ طَبَعَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهَا بِكُفْرِهِمْ فَلَا يُؤْمِنُونَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا
verse_text: Hence, (We laid Our curse on them), for they broke the covenant, denied the Revelations of Allah, and killed their Prophets unjustly, and they said: 'Our hearts are sealed (hence unable to accept Islam which is brought by Prophet Muhammad).' (Actually their hearts are not sealed). It is Allah Who has sealed their hearts, on account of their unbelief. So they believe not, except a few of them.

arabic_text: وَقَالَتِ ٱلْيَهُودُ عُزَيْرٌ ٱبْنُ ٱللَّهِ وَقَالَتِ ٱلنَّصَـٰرَى ٱلْمَسِيحُ ٱبْنُ ٱللَّهِ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ قَوْلُهُم بِأَفْوَٰهِهِمْ ۖ يُضَـٰهِـُٔونَ قَوْلَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ ۚ قَـٰتَلَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ۚ أَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
verse_text: And the Jews say: 'Uzayr is the son of Allah', while the Christians say: 'Al-Masih is the son of Allah'. Such are their assertions, by which they imitate those who disbelieved before. May Allah destroy them! How they are deluded away from the truth?

arabic_text: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِن جَآءَكُمْ فَاسِقٌۢ بِنَبَإٍۢ فَتَبَيَّنُوٓا۟ أَن تُصِيبُوا۟ قَوْمًۢا بِجَهَـٰلَةٍۢ فَتُصْبِحُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَعَلْتُمْ نَـٰدِمِينَ
verse_text: O believers! If a wicked person brings you a piece of news, inquire first into its truth, lest you should wrong others unwittingly and repent of what you have done.

arabic_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَـٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ وَإِذَا مَا غَضِبُوا۟ هُمْ يَغْفِرُونَ
verse_text: And also (better and more enduring for) those who avoid the worst of sins and indecencies and, whenever they are moved to anger (because of a wrong done to them), are ready to forgive

arabic_text: ۞ لَتُبْلَوُنَّ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ وَلَتَسْمَعُنَّ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ وَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوٓا۟ أَذًۭى كَثِيرًۭا ۚ وَإِن تَصْبِرُوا۟ وَتَتَّقُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ
verse_text: Indeed, you shall be tried in your possessions and your persons, and indeed you shall hear many hurtful things from those to whom the Scriptures were given before you and also from the polytheists. But if you endure with fortitude in adversity and be conscious of Him, then that is indeed something great to set one's heart upon.

arabic_text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْذُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ لَعَنَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ وَأَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًۭا مُّهِينًۭا
verse_text: Those who annoy Allah and His Messenger, Allah has cursed them in this world and in the Hereafter. And He has prepared for them a humiliating torment.

arabic_text: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَّخِذُوا۟ عَدُوِّى وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءَ تُلْقُونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا۟ بِمَا جَآءَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْحَقِّ يُخْرِجُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۙ أَن تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ رَبِّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ خَرَجْتُمْ جِهَـٰدًۭا فِى سَبِيلِى وَٱبْتِغَآءَ مَرْضَاتِى ۚ تُسِرُّونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَأَنَا۠ أَعْلَمُ بِمَآ أَخْفَيْتُمْ وَمَآ أَعْلَنتُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْهُ مِنكُمْ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
verse_text: O believers! Do not take My enemies and your enemies as well for your close friends (revealing to them the secrets of the Muslims) because of your affection for them, while they have denied the truth (of Islam) that has come to you and have driven the Messenger (pbuh) and yourselves out of (the Holy Land Makkah) simply because you believe in Allah, your Lord! (Do not do that) if it was indeed you who come out to fight for My cause and out of a desire to seek My good pleasure. (You will gain nothing) by being friendly to them in secret for I know full well all that you conceal and all that you reveal. And (remember) whoever of you does this then indeed he has gone astray from the right path.

arabic_text: ثُمَّ أَنتُمْ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ تَقْتُلُونَ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَتُخْرِجُونَ فَرِيقًۭا مِّنكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِهِمْ تَظَـٰهَرُونَ عَلَيْهِم بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَإِن يَأْتُوكُمْ أُسَـٰرَىٰ تُفَـٰدُوهُمْ وَهُوَ مُحَرَّمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِخْرَاجُهُمْ ۚ أَفَتُؤْمِنُونَ بِبَعْضِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَتَكْفُرُونَ بِبَعْضٍۢ ۚ فَمَا جَزَآءُ مَن يَفْعَلُ ذَٰلِكَ مِنكُمْ إِلَّا خِزْىٌۭ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَيَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَشَدِّ ٱلْعَذَابِ ۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَـٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verse_text: Yet there you are (Children of Israel), slaying your own kinsfolk and turning a number of them out of their dwellings and helping (each other) against them with sin and aggression. Though should they come to you as captives, you would ransom them, whereas it is not lawful for you to expel them. Do you then believe in one part of the (contents of) Taurat and deny another? There is no other reward for those among you who act thus than disgrace in this world, and on the Day of Judgment they will be consigned to the most grievous penalty. And (remember), Allah is not unaware of what you do.

arabic_text: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِـَٔادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verse_text: And (remember) when, We said to the angels: 'Prostrate yourselves before Adam.' They all prostrated themselves except Iblis; he refused and was haughty, and so became one of the unbelievers.

arabic_text: وَإِذْ وَٰعَدْنَا مُوسَىٰٓ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةًۭ ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذْتُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمْ ظَـٰلِمُونَ
verse_text: And (remember) when We promised Musa (to give him Taurat after he prepared) for forty nights, but in his absence, you took up the calf and worshipped it, thus committing evil (towards yourselves).

arabic_text: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نَّصْبِرَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامٍۢ وَٰحِدٍۢ فَٱدْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ يُخْرِجْ لَنَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنۢ بَقْلِهَا وَقِثَّآئِهَا وَفُومِهَا وَعَدَسِهَا وَبَصَلِهَا ۖ قَالَ أَتَسْتَبْدِلُونَ ٱلَّذِى هُوَ أَدْنَىٰ بِٱلَّذِى هُوَ خَيْرٌ ۚ ٱهْبِطُوا۟ مِصْرًۭا فَإِنَّ لَكُم مَّا سَأَلْتُمْ ۗ وَضُرِبَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلذِّلَّةُ وَٱلْمَسْكَنَةُ وَبَآءُو بِغَضَبٍۢ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ۗ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يَكْفُرُونَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَقْتُلُونَ ٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ ۗ ذَٰلِكَ بِمَا عَصَوا۟ وَّكَانُوا۟ يَعْتَدُونَ
verse_text: And (remember) when you said: 'O Musa! We cannot endure one kind of food all the time. So call on your Lord for us to give us some of the varied produce of the earth, its green herbs and cucumbers, garlic and lentils and onions.' Musa replied: 'What! Would you exchange the better for the worse? Go back to the town, and there you shall get what you demand.' But humiliation and abasement were stamped upon them and they incurred the wrath of Allah. That was because they disbelieved in (denied) Allah's revelations (which contain His commandments and the miracles to prove His power), and slew His Messengers unjustly. And this was because they rebelled and went on transgressing.

arabic_text: وَقَالَتِ ٱلْيَهُودُ يَدُ ٱللَّهِ مَغْلُولَةٌ ۚ غُلَّتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَلُعِنُوا۟ بِمَا قَالُوا۟ ۘ بَلْ يَدَاهُ مَبْسُوطَتَانِ يُنفِقُ كَيْفَ يَشَآءُ ۚ وَلَيَزِيدَنَّ كَثِيرًۭا مِّنْهُم مَّآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِن رَّبِّكَ طُغْيَـٰنًۭا وَكُفْرًۭا ۚ وَأَلْقَيْنَا بَيْنَهُمُ ٱلْعَدَٰوَةَ وَٱلْبَغْضَآءَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۚ كُلَّمَآ أَوْقَدُوا۟ نَارًۭا لِّلْحَرْبِ أَطْفَأَهَا ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَيَسْعَوْنَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَسَادًۭا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
verse_text: And the Jews say: 'Allah's hand is chained (niggardly).' May their hands be tied up, and may they be cursed for what they say! In fact, both His hands are outstretched (with His grace and bounty overflowing). He spends (bestows) as He wills; and indeed that which Allah has revealed to you will increase the wickedness and unbelief of many of them; and We have stirred among them enmity and hatred, which will endure till the Day of Resurrection. Each time they kindle the fire of war, Allah puts it out. They labour hard to spread corruption in the land, and Allah does not love those who spread corruption.

arabic_text: وَإِذْ أَخَذْنَا مِيثَـٰقَ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ لَا تَعْبُدُونَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ وَبِٱلْوَٰلِدَيْنِ إِحْسَانًۭا وَذِى ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ وَٱلْيَتَـٰمَىٰ وَٱلْمَسَـٰكِينِ وَقُولُوا۟ لِلنَّاسِ حُسْنًۭا وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّيْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا مِّنكُمْ وَأَنتُم مُّعْرِضُونَ
verse_text: And (remember O Muhammad), when We made a covenant with the Children of Israel (saying): 'You serve none but Allah, and be kind to your parents, your kinsfolk, and to the orphans and to those in need; and speak kindly to the others; and establish regular prayers and pay the alms-tax.' But, you turned your back (from your covenant) except a few, and you are an obstinate people.

arabic_text: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَقَفَّيْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ بِٱلرُّسُلِ ۖ وَءَاتَيْنَا عِيسَى ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ ٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ وَأَيَّدْنَـٰهُ بِرُوحِ ٱلْقُدُسِ ۗ أَفَكُلَّمَا جَآءَكُمْ رَسُولٌۢ بِمَا لَا تَهْوَىٰٓ أَنفُسُكُمُ ٱسْتَكْبَرْتُمْ فَفَرِيقًۭا كَذَّبْتُمْ وَفَرِيقًۭا تَقْتُلُونَ
verse_text: And verily We gave Musa the Taurat, and after him We sent other Messengers. We gave 'Isa, the son of Maryam, clear signs as miracles and We strengthened him with the Holy Spirit (Jibril). Will you then scorn whenever a Messenger comes to you with (truth) which is not to your liking, you grow arrogant, charging some with imposture and slaying others?
